meta.title: Long-term seizure, psychiatric and socioeconomic outcomes after frontal lobe epilepsy surgery
meta.authors: Khoo A, de Tisi J, Foong J, et al.
meta.outcome: Long-term seizure, psychiatric and socioeconomic outcomes after frontal lobe epilepsy surgery
meta.clinical_utility: Resective surgery for selected individuals with frontal lobe epilepsy can be effective, although multimodal outcomes are less established than in temporal lobe epilepsy. We describe long-term seizure remission and relapse patterns, psychiatric comorbidity, and socioeconomic outcomes following frontal lobe epilepsy surgery. We reviewed individual data on frontal lobe epilepsy procedures at our center between 1990 and 2020.

provenance.notes: Multi-dimension form flattened into one subgroup selector (each dimension x option). Verify vs live form. | curve strata re-derived directly from CFF named arrays (QA fix 2026-07-05).
